tagline: Licensed electricians for repairs, panel upgrades, and lighting across Stockbridge and the South Metro Atlanta area.
services_intro: From flickering outlets to full panel upgrades, KDC Electrical Services keeps Stockbridge homes and businesses safe, powered, and up to code.
service_1_desc: Fast diagnosis and repair of faulty wiring, outlets, switches, and circuits for homes and businesses.
service_2_desc: Breaker panel, meter panel, and service upgrades to safely meet modern power demands.
service_3_desc: Installation of recessed lighting, ceiling fans, and fixtures for residential and commercial spaces.
review_1_quote: Same-day service and clear communication — exactly what you want from an electrician.

review_2_quote: Neat, code-compliant panel and lighting work, with everything explained up front.

about_paragraph: KDC Electrical Services is a locally trusted electrical contractor serving Stockbridge and the surrounding South Metro Atlanta communities. We handle everything from quick repairs and troubleshooting to full panel upgrades, lighting installation, and ceiling fans — for both residential and commercial customers. With a reputation built on quality workmanship, fair pricing, and dependable service, we treat every job like it's in our own home. When you need an electrician you can count on, give us a call.
